headline: Swarm Idle: Oracle Feeds Active While Worker, Commerce, and Intake Remain Offline
summary: Oracle price feeds are live, showing minor 24h dips for AERO (-3.5%) and ETH (-0.18%), while USDC holds peg. Worker, commerce, and intake modules report zero activity, indicating a pre-operational or dormant state. Recent dev activity focused on SEO and pulse board infrastructure rather than operational compute.
sections: Worker/Intake: Zero worker cycles executed, zero intake packs processed, and zero actions completed.
Commerce: Bazaar empty with 0 providers, 0 x402 listings, and 0 monitor events registered.
Infrastructure: Recent GitHub commits deployed SEO pages and pulse board; 2 open issues remain.

marketing_campaign.hook: MCP Plugs Agents Into x402 Commerce Rails
marketing_campaign.body_short: Streamable HTTP MCP connects Cursor, Claude, and autonomous workers to 54 T54 SKUs and x402 commerce tools in minutes — listed on Smithery for instant discovery. Oracle feeds are live; your agents just need the rail. https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/mcp
marketing_campaign.body_long: Drop any agent onto the **MCP** rail and unlock 54 T54 SKUs with the x402 agent commerce API in under five minutes. Streamable HTTP means zero-friction setup for Cursor, Claude, and autonomous workers — plus Smithery listing puts your agent on the discovery map. Oracle feeds are already active; commerce rails are ready for your first autonomous transaction. Built-in Base USDC contract triage and agent-to-agent payments let buyers act the moment they connect. https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/mcp
marketing_campaign.hashtags: agent commerce API, MCP paid tools
facts: Streamable HTTP MCP — audits, T54 SKUs, x402 commerce tools.
Listed on Smithery for agent discovery.
